errors.student_message: After have/has/had to, use base verb, not past/participle/ing.

location.sentence: One problem of an ageing population is that government has to spent more money on health care and pensions.

errors.student_message: Detect likely spelling error using resource-valid word and edit-distance candidate; resource absence is never an error.

location.sentence: And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health.

errors.suggested_revision: change derivative to required noun/adjective form
errors.student_message: Derivative ending in -ed/-ing/-ly after determiner before copula may be wrong word form.

errors.student_message: Modal followed directly by predicative adjective requires 'be'.

errors.suggested_revision: use positive adjective or single comparative form
errors.student_message: Do not combine more/most/so with comparative -er form.

errors.suggested_revision: use positive adjective or single comparative form
errors.student_message: Do not combine more/most/so with comparative -er form.

location.sentence: This make a family more stronger and friendly.

errors.suggested_revision: delete article or change noun to singular depending meaning
errors.student_message: Indefinite article a/an is incompatible with plural noun head.
